MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Cassandra Coates.
Attorney, Hope Greenhill, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Shakia Thompson, is present.
Attorney, Paul Arshawsky , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem A.M. Young, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of MAY-24-2010 is vacated.
